form.layout: ==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] orgId[组织] acctSchemaId[账套] direction[应收应付] partnerId[往来单位] businessDate[业务日期] currencyId[币种] exchangeRate[汇率] docStatus[状态] ==========>amount[金额信息]====== totalAmountSource[核销总额(源币)] totalAmountFunctional[核销总额(本位币)] fxGainLoss[汇兑损益] ==========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] orgId[组织] acctSchemaId[账套] direction[应收应付] partnerId[往来单位] businessDate[业务日期] currencyId[币种] exchangeRate[汇率] docStatus[状态] ==========>amount[金额信息]====== totalAmountSource[核销总额(源币)] totalAmountFunctional[核销总额(本位币)] fxGainLoss[汇兑损益] remark[备注](2)

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[单号] docStatus[状态] partnerId[往来单位] businessDate[业务日期]

action.label: 自动核销
action.confirmText: 确认执行自动核销？系统将按 FIFO 策略匹配 OPEN/PARTIAL 收付款项与发票项。配置标志 erp-fin.auto-reconcile 必须开启，否则操作将被拒绝。

messages.success: 自动核销已完成（详见返回结果）
